name: Blair Township Park
description: The park also includes picnic area, pavilion, restrooms, kids play area, vending machines, etc.

name: Boardman River Pickleball Courts
description: On the east side of the parking lot used for the GT South Y (the Y is on the west side of the parking lot)
open_play_schedule: Reservations available for 4 of the courts at certain times of the day.

name: Bowers Harbor Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bowers Harbor Park in Traverse City, MI! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Downtown Traverse City Courts at Veterans Memorial Park
description: Downtown Traverse City Courts at Veterans Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Traverse City, MI. There are 8 outdoor concrete and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Grace Macdonald Park
description: Grace Macdonald Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Traverse City, MI. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Grand Traverse Resort and Spa
description: Come play pickleball at Grand Traverse Resort and Spa in Williamsburg, MI! There are 5 indoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Memorial Park Interlochen
description: Memorial Park Interlochen is a place to play pickleball in Interlochen, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Pickle U
description: No membership fees required. Snacks available.

name: Traverse City Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at Traverse City Senior Center in Traverse City, MI! There are 5 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: YMCA of Traverse City
description: YMCA of Traverse City is a place to play pickleball in Traverse City, MI. There are 6 indoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A membership is required to play.
